description.value:
Category: Clan
Prerequisites: Fon Clan or Shihōin Clan, Level 4+
(You cannot have the 'Onmitsu Tradition: Stealth' feat)
You've mastered the teachings of the Onmitsukido that interweave weaponry into expedient and forceful attacks. You gain the following benefits:

  • While wielding a melee weapon you are proficient in, you can give that weapon the Unarmed property.
  • Your unarmed strikes and weapons with the Unarmed property you wield gain the benefit of one weapon property of your choice that is normally found on melee weapons.
  • You gain Pressure Die equal to 1/3rd your Proficiency Bonus that are d4s that restore at the end of your next turn after their usage.
  • You can spend 1 Pressure Die to make a number of unarmed attacks as a Bonus Action equal to half the result, to Dodge as a Bonus Action, or to reroll all 1s and 2s on the next instance of damage you deal with a Taijutsu or Bukijutsu that you cast.
  • You gain the ability to teach up to two other creatures Onmitsukidō Hijutsu you know of a rank one lower than your highest jutsu known as according to your class table, up to B-Rank. Both you and the chosen creatures must spend the Downtime required to learn the jutsu as you must instruct them in the ways of your clan.
